name: nexus-memory
description: Zero-dependency persistent memory for AI agents — MCP + REST API + CLI

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search memories by keyword across all tiers

tools.name: stats
tools.description: View memory system statistics (count per tier, token usage, decay status)

tools.name: save
tools.description: Save a memory to a specific tier

tools.name: touch
tools.description: Boost a memory's recency (reset its decay clock)

path.description: Memory file path (relative to memory dir)

tools.name: decay
tools.description: Run Ebbinghaus decay on all memories (dry-run with --dry-run)
